title: HLDA-ATAC/RNA Preprocessed Data
author: Kim, Samuel H.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data repository for the Human Lung Development Atlas: 
 Preprint: https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.09.24.678382 
 Github: https://github.com/GreenleafLab/HLDA 
   
 This repository contains: 
 fragment_files.tar.gz: ATAC fragment files for each sample 
 filtered_feature_bc_matrix.tar.gz: Filtered RNA feature barcode matrix for each sample
